Singh","details":"This contract is a singleton that manages liquidation auctions across all lending markets.      When a borrower's position becomes undercollateralized, the market creates an auction      to sell the seized collateral to the highest bidder.      Dutch Auction Mechanism:      - Auction starts with a price equal to the debt amount      - Price decreases by 5% (500 bps) every hour      - Bids can be placed at or above the current price      - Reserve price is 80% of the debt amount (minimum acceptable bid)      - Late bids extend the auction by 15 minutes      - Auctions without bids are automatically retried      Features:      - Market authorization for creating auctions      - Configurable auction parameters (duration, bid increments, extension window)      - Automatic auction retry on no bids      - Factory-only configuration updates","errors":{"ReentrancyGuardReentrantCall()":[{"details":"Unauthorized reentrant call."}],"SafeERC20FailedOperation(address)":[{"details":"An operation with an ERC-20 token cancelAuction(uint256).details: Cancels an auction and refunds highest bidderUsed for emergency stops or auction cleanup

constructor.details: Initializes the liquidator with the factory address

params._factory: Address of the RevvFiFactory that will manage this liquidator

createAuction(address,address,address,ad.details: Creates a new auction for liquidated collateralReserve price is set to 80% of debt amount to ensure minimum recovery

params.borrowAsset: Token being borrowed (bids are placed in this token)
params.collateralAsset: Token being sold in the auction
params.debtAmount: Amount of debt to cover (starting price)

getCurrentPrice(uint256).details: Calculates current price in Dutch auction based on elapsed timePrice decreases by dutchAuctionPriceDecrementBps every dutchAuctionStepDuration      Cannot go below reservePrice (80% of original debt)

returns.currentPrice: Current price in borrow asset units

getWinningBid(uint256).details: Returns winning bid details for an auction

placeBid(uint256,uint256).details: Places a bid on an active auctionRefunds previous highest bidder automatically      Extends auction if bid placed near end

params.bidAmount: Amount to bid in borrow asset units

receiveCollateral(uint256).details: Records that collateral has been transferred to the liquidatorCalled by the market after transferring collateral to this contract

registerMarket(address).details: Authorizes a market to create auctions

params.market: Address of the lending market to approve

params.decrementBps: Price decrease per step in basis points
params.stepDuration: Time between price steps in seconds

settleAuction(uint256).details: Settles auction, transferring funds and collateral to winnerIf no bids received, automatically retries the auction      Otherwise, transfers funds to market and collateral to winner

cancelAuction(uint256).notice: Only callable by the factory contract

constructor.notice: Sets starting auction ID to 1 (0 is reserved for null)

placeBid(uint256,uint256).notice: Bids must meet minimum requirements:        - No existing bid: bid >= current price        - Existing bid: bid >= highest bid + increment        - Cannot exceed original debt amount

registerMarket(address).notice: Only callable by the factory contract

settleAuction(uint256).notice: Can only be called after auction end time
